content.en:
"Miao'an-sama, I want the inheritance of the secret text of the Supreme Dao!"

Ye Tian said.

"Supreme Dao Secret Text Inheritance?" Miao An thought about it, and agreed, with her status and status, it is not difficult to get some Supreme Dao Secret Text Inheritance, but it belongs to the inheritance of Taisu Palace, and she can't pass it on.

Subsequently, she got thousands of Supreme Dao Secret Texts and handed them over to Ye Tian, which can be regarded as handing them over to the True River Valley, after all, Ye Tian is the elder of the True River Valley.

"I didn't expect that the two Supreme Dao Realm geniuses of the Taisu Palace could easily take out thousands of tradable Supreme Dao Secret Text Inheritances!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

When I think about it, I think it's normal.

There are only a few hundred Supreme Dao Secret Texts in the True River Valley, because the True River Valley is too weak, and how powerful the Taisu Palace is, there are many forces under its command, and with Miao'an's status, it is natural that he can easily get the inheritance of the Supreme Dao Secret Texts, but the True River Valley can't get it.

With these Supreme Dao Secret Texts Inheritance, it will be very helpful for him to create his own Supreme Dao Divine Power in the future, which can save a lot of time, and can even make the Supreme Dao Divine Power more powerful and perfect.

Of course, for other Supreme Dao realms, the help of a mere thousands of Supreme Dao Secret Texts was not so great.

......

Xuanlin Mountain Boundary.

"Those Taisu Palace to the Dao Realm have all left, the huge Xuanlin Mountain Realm has become deserted, and my true body copy body is cultivating here, so it is even more difficult to be discovered!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he was still unlucky enough to be killed by the most strange things in the world.

Fortunately, the most curious thing will not take away the resources he drops, even if you lose the resources, you can still get them back.

Otherwise, he wouldn't dare to cultivate here.

In the years to come, he was ready to continue his cultivation here and raise his strength to the limit of the ninth balance.

With the help of many resources, one solstice after another years have passed.

In the blink of an eye, it is hundreds of thousands of years of Taoism.

With the help of so many resources, Ye Tian's cultivation had finally reached the limit of the ninth balance, which was also the limit of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

After that, he tried to break through, but found that the bottleneck was impregnable, and many resources could not help him break the shackles.

"The Supreme Dao Rule Realm is still not strong enough, at least we have to raise the Supreme Dao Rule Realm to a higher realm, so that we can hope to break through to the First Supreme Dao Realm. "

So, he was going to go to Taisu Palace's Guiding Dao Great Array to cultivate again.

The Taisu Palace's Great Array of Guiding Dao will be opened every five thousand to Dao years.

In order to keep a low profile and not attract attention, he did not go in again.

But this time, he was ready to go again.

As for the materials needed by Taisu Palace, he collected a lot, and the Dongguang Replica Body easily obtained the quota to enter the Guiding Dao Great Array.

Once again, the Great Array opened.

Ye Tian entered it and began to comprehend the rules of the Dao.

However, this time, the effect of the Great Array was not as good as the first time.

He also knew the reason, because his Supreme Dao Rule Realm had improved, and the Great Array of Guiding Dao would naturally not have the effect of the first time.

If he continued to improve the rules of the Dao in the future, maybe the Great Array of Dao Guidance would be completely ineffective for him.

It's like why the powerhouses of Taisu Palace don't enter the Guiding Dao Great Array, that is, the Supreme Dao Rule Realm is very high, and the Guiding Dao Great Array is useless to them.

Although the effect is a little worse, under the comprehension of one after another years of enlightenment, his supreme rules have skyrocketed a lot.

this day.

Ye Tian came out of the Guiding Dao Array, but soon paid some more materials and obtained a place again.

After that, he once again entered the Great Array of Initiation Paths to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao.

He knew that if he did this, he would definitely attract the attention of Taisu Palace, but he didn't care.

Asking is good luck, obtained the Supreme Dao Blood Gold Vein, and obtained a large amount of Supreme Dao Blood Gold.

If this replica body gets too much attention, it's a big deal to give up.

So, in the following years, every time he entered the Great Array of Guiding Dao to comprehend the rules of the Dao.

This made his Supreme Dao Rule realm higher and higher, and his strength was also increasing rapidly.

......

Taisu Palace.

Deep.

Miao An and a group of double and triple Dao realm geniuses came here, and they were indeed vigorously cultivated by the Taisu Palace during this time, but the time was still very short, and they couldn't see much progress at present.

At this time.

They also thought that this time, as usual, they would get some kind of guidance and training.

However, a large array emerged, disconnected from the perception of the outside world.

Then.

A sevenfold Supreme Dao Elder appeared.

"I've seen Elder Yun Shu!"

Many supreme realms said respectfully.

Elder Yun Shu looked at these Dao Realm geniuses and said lightly, "Next, I will send you to a secret place to cultivate, which is very important, once you go there, you will not be allowed to contact any relatives and friends." And, now is the past. "

"Yes!"

Although Miao An and the others were in the Dao Realm, they did not dare to disobey the orders of Elder Yun Shu.

Moreover, they are all looking forward to it, thinking that this time must be a big opportunity.

Soon.

A large void passage emerged, and then began a long teleportation.

"This seems to be leaving the Infinity Domain......"

Miao An and many other Dao Realm geniuses were shocked.

And just after they were teleported away, Taisu appeared.

"Taisu, these little guys have been sent away, sent to a branch outside the Infinite Domain, I will explain the details to them, and I will really cultivate them. In addition, a lot of resources have also been transferred. Yun Shu said.

"Well, with them here, coupled with the strength we left outside the Infinite Domain, even if we are defeated, Taisu Palace still has hope of rising!" Taisu said: "Next, I hope to be able to cultivate a Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm again at all costs, in that case, the success rate will be a little higher." "

"Hmm!"

Yun Shu nodded.

......

Ye Tian didn't know Taisu Palace's plan, and even if he knew, he didn't care, and it had nothing to do with him.

However, after Miao An and other Dao Realm geniuses were teleported away, Zhenyang, the son of the Valley Lord of the True River Valley, panicked.

There was no way, he couldn't contact Miao'an, and even went to Xuanmiao Palace, but he didn't get any response.

There are so many heirs of the Xuanmiao Palace Master, she will pay attention to Miao'an, but she will not pay attention to Zhenyang!

Zhenyang couldn't find Miao'an, and he couldn't use the relationship of Xuanmiao Palace, so he gradually couldn't get more resources and treatment.

In addition, in order to get a quota, Miao'an can offend a lot of the Supreme Dao Realm of Taisu Palace!

Now that Miao An is not here, he is also afraid that those geniuses of the Taisu Palace to the Dao Realm will trouble him.

Thereupon.

He returned to the True River Valley, intending to stay in the True River Valley for a while.

And not long after returning to the True River Valley, Ye Tian's Cave Light Replica Body was targeted by the True River Valley Lord.
